history.content:
<thought>
The goal is visible at row 05 column F, ahead and slightly to the right. The cell directly in front of me is a floor cell (safe to move to). I will move forward to get closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The goal is still visible at row 06 column F, which is two cells ahead and one cell to the right. The cell directly in front of me is floor (safe), so I will move forward again.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The goal is now directly to the right of my position. The cell in front of me is open floor, but moving forward won't bring me closer to the goal. I should turn right to face the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am now facing the goal which is two cells ahead and one cell to the left. The immediate cell in front of me is floor and safe to move forward. I will move forward to get closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I see the goal directly ahead at row 6 column D. However, the cell directly in front of me is lava, which is deadly. I need to avoid moving forward. The cell to my right appears to be safe floor. I will turn right to try moving around the lava.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I'm currently facing the right side. The goal is to my left diagonal, but there is lava directly in front and to the left side. Looking to my right, there is a safe floor cell. To avoid lava and reach the goal safely, I will move forward into the safe cell.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
